name: Launch Control
description: Track launches, run readiness gates, and escalate blockers — backed live by the Dataverse MCP server (Ep 13).

conversation_starters.title: Launch status
conversation_starters.text: What's the status of the Q3 Widget Launch?

conversation_starters.title: Go / No-Go
conversation_starters.text: Run lc_CalculateLaunchReadiness for the Q3 Widget Launch and explain the verdict.

conversation_starters.title: Blocked tasks
conversation_starters.text: Are there any blocked tasks for the Q3 Widget Launch? Verify against GitHub before answering.

conversation_starters.title: Escalate blocker
conversation_starters.text: Escalate the Marketing Approval blocker per our escalation policy.

conversation_starters.title: Team overview
conversation_starters.text: Who is on the Q3 Widget Launch team and what is each person assigned to?
